heroHeadline: Day 41: Al Jazeera Fact-Check Challenges Vance's Claims on Iran's Unchanged 10-Point Ceasefire Plan
heroSubtitle: Al Jazeera analysis finds Iran's 10-point ceasefire conditions largely unchanged despite JD Vance's claims of a diplomatic shift. NYT reports North Korea draws lessons from the Iran War. Fresh Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon threaten the fragile US-Iran truce.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-09. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal.
